IMAGES NEEDED
=============
Place the following image files in this folder (esther/frontend/public/):

1. esther_logo.png  - TEG ministry logo
2. image1.png       - Hero/background image
3. image2.png       - Prayer section image
4. image3.png       - Welfare section image
5. image4.png       - Gallery image 1
6. image5.png       - Gallery image 2
7. image6.png       - Gallery image 3
8. image7.png       - Gallery image 4

You can use .jpg instead of .png - just update the image paths in:
- src/components/HomePage.jsx
- src/pages/GalleryPage.jsx
